title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, its first publicly available Mythos-class AI model, with capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. The company implemented safety systems to limit its full capabilities in high-risk domains like cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as a Mythos-class model with capabilities spanning software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, and scientific research. It details the model's built-in safety systems, which restrict responses in high-risk domains including cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry. The takeaway is a model positioned for broad technical and analytical work paired with domain-specific guardrails on hazardous topics.
